message:
chore: ignore .pi directory (may contain API keys)

Add .pi/ to .gitignore to prevent accidental commits of:
- Local Pi agent configuration (settings.json)
- Session files containing conversation history
- API keys that may be stored in config files
- User-specific prompts, skills, and themes

The .pi directory is the per-project config location created when
running pi in a directory. It should never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,3 +9,6 @@ rustc-ice-*.txt
 
 # br local history backups
 .beads/.br_history/
+
+# local Pi agent config (may contain API keys)
+.pi/
